title: Argo CD Stuck Sync with Running Operation State
app: Modular input or Event Router shipping Argo CD application CR status
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| where operation_state="Running" OR phase="Running"
| eval age_sec=now()-_time
| where age_sec > 900
| table _time, name, namespace, operation_state, phase, revision, age_sec
| sort -age_sec
description: Long-running syncs often indicate API server slowness, CRD webhooks, or network partitions.
value: Identifies sync operations that exceed a 15-minute window for operator intervention.
implementation: Poll application status every 60s; tune threshold per environment. Join with Kubernetes API latency metrics if ingested.

references.title: Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)

knownFalsePositives: Pipeline noise during blue/green cutovers, dependency cache cold-starts, or scheduled maintenance windows.
grandmaExplanation: We watch GitOps sync and Argo signals so clusters stay aligned with the desired configuration in Git.
